inputs.label: Input unit multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1000 for keV, 1e6 for MeV. Default 1 for eV.

inputs.label: Output unit multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Set to 0.001 for kJ, 1e-6 for MJ. Default 1 for joules.

inputs.label: Decimal places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result.

formulas.joules: Math.round((electronVolts * inputScale * conversionFactor * outputScale) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
formulas.calculationDetails: 'Energy (J) = ' + electronVolts + ' eV × ' + conversionFactor + ' J/eV = ' + (electronVolts * inputScale * conversionFactor * outputScale) + ' J (with input scale ' + inputScale + ' and output scale ' + outputScale + ')'
